page_title: Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 11: Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜I'll Give the True Love for You〜
text:
is pachislot simulation game based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion ～Magokoro o, kimi ni～ machine, released on 09 September 2007 (PlayStation 2) and on 21 February 2008 (Nintendo DS) by D3 Publisher.
